title: DasuperiorWeight 2.0 - Weight System
description: DASuperiorWeight adds a realistic weight system to Minecraft. Items have custom weights (e.g., pickaxe = 1.3 kg), shown in a HUD. The mod tracks total carried weight client-side and server-side, allowing gameplay effects like movement slowdown or limits.
body:
**DASuperiorWeight**

DASuperiorWeight adds a realistic weight and carry limit system to Minecraft.

Item weights: Metal blocks = 5kg, other blocks = 1kg, tools = 2kg (customizable).

HUD: Movable, toggle between numeric (kg) or bar (lbs).

**Movement:**
≤234kg = normal (green)

234–456kg = slowed (orange)

456kg = heavy slowness (red)

**Server commands:**
/weight thresholds <orange> <red> – set slowdown limits.

/weight item <id> <kg> – override item weight.

/weight bonus <player> <kg> – add/remove carry capacity.

/weight multiplier <player> <mult> – scale weight effect.

/weight reload – reload config.
